cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
[?2004l[?2004himport json
[?2004l[?2004hwith open('build/test/task2/functional-0/001_var_defn.sysu.c/answer.json') as f: [A[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[C[K:
[?2004l[?2004h    d = json.load(f)
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h# Get all unique qualType strings
[?2004l[?2004hdef collect_types(obj, types):
[?2004l[?2004h    if isinstance(obj, dict):
[?2004l[?2004h        if 'qualType' in obj and isinstance(obj['qualType'], str):
[?2004l[?2004h            types.add(obj['qualType'])
[?2004l[?2004h        for v in obj.values():
[?2004l[?2004h            collect_types(v, types)
[?2004l[?2004h    elif isinstance(obj, list):
[?2004l[?2004h        for v in obj:
[?2004l[?2004h            collect_types(v, types)
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004htypes = set()
[?2004l[?2004hcollect_types(d, types)
[?2004l[?2004hprint(sorted(types))
